final:
// // This module implements a 4-input OR gate instead of a NOR gate
module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input C,
    input D,
    output reg Y
);always @(*) begin
        if(!(A|B|C|D)) begin
            Y = 1'b1;
        end else begin
            Y = 1'b0;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-input OR gate instead of a NOR gate
